name: COSTCO WHOLESALE CORP /NEW
summary: Costco Wholesale Corp operates membership-based warehouse clubs offering a curated selection of merchandise at low prices. Products include groceries, electronics, appliances, clothing, and sundries, sold in bulk or large quantities. Costco also offers ancillary services such as gasoline, pharmacies, optical, food courts, and travel services. Revenue is generated through merchandise sales and membership fees from individual and business members.

products.name: Warehouse Club Merchandise
products.description: Bulk and large-quantity retail goods including groceries, electronics, appliances, and clothing sold at low prices.

products.name: Gasoline
products.description: Fuel sales offered at Costco warehouse locations as an ancillary service.

products.name: Pharmacy
products.description: Prescription and health-related pharmacy services available at warehouse locations.

products.name: Optical
products.description: Vision care and optical products offered as an ancillary service at warehouses.

products.name: Food Court
products.description: In-store food court providing prepared food and beverages to members and guests.

products.name: Travel Services
products.description: Travel-related services offered to Costco members.

products.name: Membership
products.description: Individual and business membership programs generating fee-based revenue for warehouse access.
